notes: Haven't been able to get running by disablign D3d11, or using Wine D3d11. According to the dev, a mac and linux build will be released shortly [https://steamcommunity.com/app/956450/discussions/0/1744480967019019381/]
title: Rogue Fable III

notes: Played a couple of games. The game runs very slowly (5-12fps), but it's still very playable even at that speed. CPU-load almost at max. I didn't notice any other problems with it. Hoping for a native version soon.
title: Rogue Fable III
